title: Status Schemas
description: Various status type definitions for Traigent platform

ExperimentRunStatus.description: Status of an experiment run. Canonical UPPER vocabulary aligned to the backend ExperimentRunStatus enum (native PG type experimentrunstatus); producers (backend, REST wire, SDK write path) emit UPPER.

ConfigurationRunStatus.description: Status of a configuration run. Canonical UPPER vocabulary aligned to the backend ConfigurationRunStatus enum; PRUNED is the early-stopped-for-efficiency success case.

HealthStatus.description: Health status options for services and components

ObservabilityTraceStatus.description: Execution status for observability traces and observations (lowercase arm). Canonical lowercase vocabulary: 'running' (default/in-progress), 'completed' (success), 'failed' (error exit), 'rejected' (policy or validation rejection). Served verbatim by /api/v1beta/observability/* (traces, observations, prompt_links). See TraigentSchema#175.

ObservabilitySpanStatus.description: Execution status for workflow trace spans (UPPER arm). Canonical UPPER vocabulary aligned to the backend SpanStatus native PG enum (spanstatus); values sourced from SpanStatus in status_enums.py. Served verbatim by /api/v1/traces workflow-span family. Non-colliding with ObservabilityTraceStatus — these two families ride separate URL prefixes. See TraigentSchema#175.
